src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/Lambda.general_idea: Add Apache Commons IO dependency for file utility operations.
Add deduplication registry classes to handle event processing.
Add new server command implementations for start, stop, reboot, and restart.
Add new instance command implementations for start and stop.
Replace Ec2ClientProvider with Ec2ClientPool for better resource management.
Add BotCommunicator class to encapsulate bot communication logic.
Add Telegram User object import for extracting user details.
Add Optional import for safe null handling in user name extraction.
Centralize configuration retrieval via ConfigManager static methods.
Update TelegramBotFactory import path to reflect package restructuring.
Add BotCommunicator field to manage bot interactions.
Add UpdateEventsRegistry field to track processed events for deduplication.
Add constant for standardized server error message.
Initialize FSUpdateEventsRegistry with TTL and root directory from config.
Update sender initialization to use ConfigManager methods for token and username.
Replace Ec2ClientProvider with Ec2ClientPool in initialization.
Initialize BotCommunicator with the AbsSender instance.
Pass BotCommunicator to CommandDispatcher instead of AbsSender.
Register /startServer command with V2 implementation.
Register /stopServer command with V2 implementation.
Register /rebootServer command.
Register /restartServer command.
Register /startInstance command.
Register /stopInstance command.
Rename parameter apiGatewayProxyRequestEvent to gwEvent for brevity.
Update health check response message to include 'Application version' label.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/Lambda.human_impl: .withBody("Open VPN Configurer performs normally. Application version: %s ..."

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/Lambda.general_idea: Send error message to bot on payload parsing failure.
Change error response body to empty JSON and status to 201 on parse failure.
Send error message to bot on update handling failure.
Change error response body to empty JSON and status to 201 on handle failure.
Check if event has already been processed to skip duplicates.
Register current event in the registry after processing check.
Extract message from update and validate separately with specific logging.
Validate that Chat ID is present in the message.
Set Chat ID in BotCommunicator for subsequent responses.
Extract and log username safely using Optional.
Remove local getAppVersion method as it is now handled by ConfigManager.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Replace direct Telegram Bot API sender dependency with a custom BotCommunicator abstraction to decouple dispatch logic from the library.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: Changed field from 'AbsSender sender' to 'BotCommunicator botCommunicator' and updated constructor.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Switch command registry from HashMap to LinkedHashMap to ensure deterministic iteration order for commands.
Remove checked TelegramApiException from public API and internal methods to simplify caller contracts.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: Removed 'throws TelegramApiException' from 'handle', 'runCommand', and error sending methods.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Delegate message sending to the new BotCommunicator instead of constructing SendMessage objects manually.
Catch specific application exceptions to provide user-friendly error messages instead of crashing.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: Added try-catch blocks for 'InvalidCommandException' and 'CommandExecutionFailedException' in 'runCommand'.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Support EmptyResponse type to allow commands that do not return text output.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: Added check 'else if (!(resp instanceof EmptyResponse))' to avoid throwing IllegalStateException for empty responses.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Register new server management commands as permitted implementations of the sealed BotCommand interface.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: Added StopInstanceCommand, StartInstanceCommand, StartServerCommandV2, StopServerCommandV2, RestartServerCommand, StartServerCommand, StopServerCommand, and RebootServerCommand to the permits clause.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Refine the application description in the help command to accurately reflect EC2 instance management and list supported AWS regions.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: Changed APP_DESCRIPTION string to mention 'EC2 Instances (Servers)' and added specific region support details (us-east-1, eu-north-1, eu-west-2).

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Replace direct usage of Ec2Client and Region iteration with a consolidated Ec2Manager to simplify instance listing logic.
Remove imports for Ec2InstanceManager, Ec2Client, and Region that are no longer used after refactoring to Ec2Manager.
Change the output format of the list instances command to use bullet points and include a header, removing numbered lists.
Always display the Public IP in the output instead of conditionally appending it only if it is a valid IPv4 address.
Remove the private getAllRegions helper method as region iteration is now handled internally by Ec2Manager.
Refactor version retrieval by removing inline resource reading logic and delegating to a centralized ConfigManager utility.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: Replaced private `readVersion()` method and its imports with a call to `ConfigManager.getAppVersion()`.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/ec2/Ec.general_idea: Convert the Ec2ClientProvider class into an interface to enable dependency injection and decouple client creation logic.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/ec2/Ec.human_impl: Changed 'public class Ec2ClientProvider' to 'public interface Ec2ClientProvider' and removed method bodies.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/ec2/Ec.general_idea: Remove the import for software.amazon.awssdk.regions.Region as it is no longer used after removing the implementation details.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/ec2/In.general_idea: Add a region field to the InstanceInfo class to store the AWS region of the EC2 instance.

dependency-reduced-pom.xml.general_idea: Update Lombok dependency to a newer version compatible with the target environment.
Add JUnit Jupiter API dependency to support modern JUnit 5 testing.
Add Mockito JUnit Jupiter integration dependency for testing.
Set Maven compiler target to Java 21 to ensure bytecode compatibility.
Update the project's Java version property to 21.
Set Maven compiler source to Java 21 to allow use of Java 21 language features.
